name: zettelkasten-skills
description: Zettelkasten methodology skill for local markdown note systems. Capture raw ideas as typed notes and connect existing vaults with link suggestions and Maps of Content.
longDescription:
Two modes in one skill:

**Capture** — Give Claude a raw idea, URL, or text snippet and it produces a properly typed note with frontmatter, a concept-oriented title, and wikilink suggestions.

**Connect** — Point Claude at a vault or directory and it finds orphaned notes, surfaces missing links between related notes, and generates Maps of Content for topic clusters.

Supports Obsidian CLI (preferred), direct Bash file writes, and markdown output fallback. Automatically discovers your vault folder layout — no configuration needed.

skills.name: zettelkasten
skills.description: Capture raw ideas as typed Zettelkasten notes or analyse an existing vault to find orphan notes, suggest links, and build Maps of Content.

examples.prompt: 문득 생각났는데, 습관은 환경 설계로 바꾸는 게 의지력보다 훨씬 쉬운 것 같아. 노트 만들어줘.
examples.description: Captures a fleeting idea as a Fleeting note with auto-detected type

examples.prompt: James Clear의 Atomic Habits에서 습관 루프 개념 정리해줘.
examples.description: Creates a Literature note from a specific source

examples.prompt: 저장해줘 — 복잡한 시스템은 단순한 규칙에서 출현한다.
examples.description: Creates a Permanent (Evergreen) note from a single atomic claim

examples.prompt: 내 vault ~/notes에 있는 노트들 분석해서 연결 상태 알려줘.
examples.description: Scans a vault, finds orphan notes and suggests missing links
Generates a Map of Content for a topic cluster

noteTypes.description: Quick capture, unpolished idea. Process or delete within 48h.
Key ideas from a specific source, in your own words.
One atomic idea stated as a complete claim. Title = a complete sentence.
Navigation hub linking related Permanent notes.

plugin.description: Load as a plugin (recommended — skill is available in all sessions)

personal.description: Install as a personal skill (available in all projects)

project.description: Install as a project skill (available in this project only)
